//: Example Claude Code settings for zlauder. The easiest way to produce this
//init: per project is `zlauder-hooks init` (it picks a free per-project port,
//init2: writes this file, the /privacy command, and a starter zlauder.toml).
//warn: ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL points Claude Code at this project's local proxy.
//warn2: The port is per-project (each project gets its own isolated proxy).
